recommended.song_name: How Can You Mend A Broken Heart

content:
Title: Love Will Lead You Back 

Artist/band: Taylor Dayne

Source of Chords: Charlie Edsel Valera 


    For Comments/Suggestions email us @ charlieedsel_valera@yahoo.com.ph friendster acct also. . .

[tab]         [ch]A2[/ch]                [ch]D2[/ch]
Saying goodbye is never an easy thing [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]A2[/ch]
But you never said you'd stay forever [/tab]
[tab]                [ch]A2[/ch]
So if you must go, [/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D2[/ch]
Oh, Darling I'll set you free [/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm[/ch] 
But I know in time [/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F#m[/ch]
We'll be together [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]A/C#[/ch]
I will try to stop you now from leaving [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D2[/ch]           F#m7sus
Cause in My Heart I know [/tab]

Chorus:
[tab]                   [ch]DM7[/ch]
Love will lead you back [/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]E[/ch]
Some day I just know that [/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]AM7[/ch]
Love will lead you back to my arms [/tab]
        F#m7sus
Where you belong 
[tab]          [ch]DM7[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
I'm sure, sure as stars are shining [/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]AM7[/ch]
One day you will find me again [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
And it won't be long [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D2[/ch]
One of these days our love [/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]A2[/ch]-[ch]D2[/ch]-[ch]E[/ch]
Will lead you back [/tab]

[do verse chords}
One of these nights 
Oh I'll hear your voice again 
You're gonna say 
How much you miss me 
You'll walk out this door, but 
Some day you'll walk back in 
Darling I know, I know this will be 
Sometimes it takes some time out on your own 
To find your way back home 

Chorus:
[tab]                   [ch]DM7[/ch]
Love will lead you back [/tab]

I'm sure, sure as stars are shining [/tab]
